title: Bridge Essay: Predictive coding for the actions and emotions of others and its deficits in aut

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** (Phase 6) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Dependent-arising to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Predictive coding for the actions and emotions of others and its deficits in autism spectrum disorders.** — Neurosci Biobehav Rev. PMID: 39260714. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2024.105877. Traditionally, the neural basis of social perception has been studied by showing participants brief examples of the actions or emotions of others presented in randomized order to prevent participants from anticipating what others do and feel. This approach is optimal to isolate the importance of information flow from lower to higher cortical areas.
